prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon runner preparing for race day - needs high carbohydrate loading with 4000+ calories to support endurance training

solution_criteria: Meal plan totals 4000+ calories with emphasis on carbohydrates (55-65% of total intake)
Includes 4-5 meals/snacks distributed throughout the day to support marathon training demands
All meals are vegetarian and nut-free
Format is compact and concise (suitable for quick reference on race day)
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a specific sport discipline (e.g., marathon runner) that requires high carbohydrate loading and specific calorie targets (4000+ calories), ensuring the meal plan addresses sport-specific nutritional demands within the compact format
